text.heading: WORKSHOP ON ENHANCING CRITICAL AND CREATIVE THINKING THROUGH READING AND WRITING
text.p: The Centre for Distance Learning is organizing a 3-day intensive workshop for Programme instructors on enhancing critical and creative thinking through reading and writing.

The overall objective of the workshop is to enhance the quality of all programmes of the Centre for Distance Learning The workshop which is in collaboration with the Reading Association of Nigeria, lle-lfe chapter, will cover various topics with two facilitators from USA ( National Writing project, Boston and Saint Cloud State University, Minneapolis) and one from Nigeria (X. X. Dept Of English, O.A.U, lle-lfe). We will use the workshop to also expose the participants to the Video conferencing technology, as one of the techniques in Open and Distance Electronics Learning mode.
The workshop which will commence on Monday, 13th August, 2007 at 10.00am will end on Wednesday 15th August, 2007
The venue is the Conference room of the Centre for Distance Learning. Kindly attend the workshop.
